prompt: Write a proof artifact at experiments/watchtower-engine/proof/c1-first-real-run.md. It must state, in plain English: this is the FIRST end-to-end run of the Watchtower consumer (claim -> execute -> record -> done); include the queue_id, the experiment_id, and confirm the job moved through queue/ -> running/ -> done/. Keep it under 12 lines.

args.label: internal
args.purpose: prove the consumer spine end-to-end, by hand, no loop/mutex/monitor
